title: agropyron spicatum
intro: Agropyron spicatum, also known as speargrass, is a type of perennial grass native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of speargrass include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties which may help to soothe digestive issues. Speargrass can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it accessible for various herbal remedies.
